text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, in the central plaza...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Huh, looks like I've got a message<n>from my
agent. Let's see... they need<n>me for some detail
shots after this,<n>huh?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Urk, but I have training then! Why do<n>these
scheduling conflicts keep<n>happening...
choice_data_list: You seem pretty busy. Everything okay?
You seem pretty busy. Everything okay?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's just you. Thanks for the<n>concern, but I
was the one who<n>decided to take all this on, so
it's fine.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
My race is coming up soon, though,<n>so I'm
gonna have a lot on my plate...
choice_data_list: Focus on what's at hand for now!
Would you like an energy drink?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah, you're right. I don't have time<n>to be
indecisive.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I've just gotta get things done one at<n>a time...
Okay, I've got this. Thanks for<n>the tip.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Huh? For real? You're a lifesaver.<n>Showing up to
a shoot like a zombie<n>doesn't exactly scream
professional.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Nice, I'm ready to take on the world<n>now. Thanks
again for the drink. I'll do<n>my best at the shoot
and my race.
